## Example subject trace (subject_id=649943)

First 80 trials showing predicted P(lick), context belief p_vis, alongside the actual response, stimulus type, and reward.

The `p_vis` column is the key interpretable output -- it should show the model tracking block switches between visual-rewarded and auditory-rewarded contexts.
